plugins.name: @orqastudio/plugin-software-project

plugins.description: Claude AI provider — Agent SDK sidecar for streaming conversations, tool execution, and model management.

plugins.description: Rust and Tauri development infrastructure — clippy, rustfmt, cargo test with rule-driven coding standards enforcement.

plugins.description: Base Rust development infrastructure — clippy, rustfmt, cargo-test configuration and coding standards enforcement.

plugins.name: @orqastudio/plugin-typescript
plugins.description: Base TypeScript development infrastructure — tsconfig presets, ESLint configs, and config composition for plugin extensions.

plugins.name: @orqastudio/plugin-coding-standards
plugins.description: Unified coding standards enforcement — config generation from governance rules, quality checks via orqa check.
